dhp44-59:1.0.44: Ko imaṁ pathaviṁ vicessati,Yamalokañca imaṁ sadevakaṁ;Ko dhammapadaṁ sudesitaṁ,Kusalo pupphamiva pacessati.
dhp44-59:1.0.45: Sekho pathaviṁ vicessati,Yamalokañca imaṁ sadevakaṁ;Sekho dhammapadaṁ sudesitaṁ,Kusalo pupphamiva pacessati.
dhp44-59:1.0.46: Pheṇūpamaṁ kāyamimaṁ viditvā,Marīcidhammaṁ abhisambudhāno;Chetvāna mārassa papupphakāni,Adassanaṁ maccurājassa gacche.
dhp44-59:1.0.47: Pupphāni heva pacinantaṁ,byāsattamanasaṁ naraṁ;Suttaṁ gāmaṁ mahoghova,maccu ādāya gacchati.
dhp44-59:1.0.48: Pupphāni heva pacinantaṁ,byāsattamanasaṁ naraṁ;Atittaññeva kāmesu,antako kurute vasaṁ.
dhp44-59:1.0.49: Yathāpi bhamaro pupphaṁ,vaṇṇagandhamaheṭhayaṁ;Paleti rasamādāya,evaṁ gāme munī care.
dhp44-59:1.0.50: Na paresaṁ vilomāni,na paresaṁ katākataṁ;Attanova avekkheyya,katāni akatāni ca.
dhp44-59:1.0.51: Yathāpi ruciraṁ pupphaṁ,vaṇṇavantaṁ agandhakaṁ;Evaṁ subhāsitā vācā,aphalā hoti akubbato.
dhp44-59:1.0.52: Yathāpi ruciraṁ pupphaṁ,Vaṇṇavantaṁ sagandhakaṁ;Evaṁ subhāsitā vācā,Saphalā hoti kubbato.
dhp44-59:1.0.53: Yathāpi puppharāsimhā,kayirā mālāguṇe bahū;Evaṁ jātena maccena,kattabbaṁ kusalaṁ bahuṁ.
dhp44-59:1.0.54: Na pupphagandho paṭivātameti,Na candanaṁ tagaramallikā vā;Satañca gandho paṭivātameti,Sabbā disā sappuriso pavāyati.
dhp44-59:1.0.55: Candanaṁ tagaraṁ vāpi,uppalaṁ atha vassikī;Etesaṁ gandhajātānaṁ,sīlagandho anuttaro.
dhp44-59:1.0.56: Appamatto ayaṁ gandho,yāyaṁ tagaracandanī;Yo ca sīlavataṁ gandho,vāti devesu uttamo.
dhp44-59:1.0.58: Yathā saṅkāradhānasmiṁ,ujjhitasmiṁ mahāpathe;Padumaṁ tattha jāyetha,sucigandhaṁ manoramaṁ.
